message:
fix(beads): sync issues.jsonl with current bead statuses (4864 entries)

The committed JSONL was massively stale (3378 entries) due to skip-worktree
flag preventing updates. This caused h2_closure_packet_dependency_status_alignment
test to fail because asupersync-346lm showed as in_progress when it was actually
closed. Removed skip-worktree flag and committed the current JSONL state with
all 4864 beads and their correct statuses.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
